report.summary:
Pushpendra Menaria demonstrated a neutral overall impression during the Data Science interview, communicating with high confidence. 
• Key strengths: Proven familiarity with Pandas.
• Areas for improvement: Limited hands-on production experience.
• Scoring metrics: Interview Score: 73/100 | Final Assessment Score: 77.2/100.
Conclusion: We recommend the status as 'Hire' based on this evaluation.
